title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DTDC - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DTDC - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DTDC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!
